info.gene.geneticsresequenced.frost_proo: Makes you immune to cold damage.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.wilden: Grants the magical potency of Wilden beasts.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.wilden_4: Grants the magical potency of the Wilden Chimera.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.stone_skin: Your skin hardens, granting you extra armor.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.bovine: Causes the affected creature to drop some Beef when killed.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.galline: Causes the affected creature to drop some Chicken when killed.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.lapine: Causes the affected creature to drop some Rabbit when killed.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.ovine: Causes the affected creature to drop some Mutton when killed.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.porcine: Causes the affected creature to drop some Porkchops when killed.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.burgeoning: Causes the affected creature to drop some Flowers when killed.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.saevine: Causes the affected creature to drop some Wilden Meat when killed.
info.gene.geneticsresequenced.chimeric: Causes the affected creature to drop some Chimera Meat when killed.
